default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss a viral LinkedIn post and strategy for automating outreach and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel shared a LinkedIn post that went viral with 300+ comments](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [The strategy involves creating posts that require comments, then automating connection requests and messages to engagers](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Marcel set up Phantom Buster automations to send connection requests, follow-up messages, and reply to comments](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Sarah will help manually reply to remaining comments to drive further engagement](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Topics

### Viral LinkedIn Post

  - [Marcel's post received 300+ comments, driving increased visibility](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [The post gave an offer that required people to comment to engage](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)

### Automation Setup

  - [Marcel used Phantom Buster to automate:](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Sending connection requests to anyone engaging with the post](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
      - [Sending a message along with the connection request](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [Sending a follow-up message 2 days later](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [The automation tracked sent requests as "pending" on each profile](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)

### Manual Engagement

  - [For profiles not automated, Sarah will:](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [Send a connection request](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Like the person's comment](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Reply to their comment with a variation like "All set, connected\!"](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Replying quickly drives more engagement on the viral post](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sarah to finish manually replying to remaining comments today](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Time blocked tomorrow for additional acquisition work if needed](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Marcel to continue using this automated engagement strategy](https://fathom.video/share/H8VE34iSWXs8j9D5ByiNaDR-RrquyNtQ?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

action_items.description: Respond to leads who have commented on or liked Marcel's recent LinkedIn post, and send connection requests to those who have not been reached yet using the message and instructions provided
Schedule a work block for tomorrow to work on acquisition tasks as discussed
